headline: Monte Rosa J J Supply Deal Refocuses MRT 2359 Prostate Cancer Story
summary: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (NasdaqGS:GLUE) announced a new supply agreement with Johnson & Johnson to evaluate MRT-2359 with ERLEADA in metastatic castration resistant prostate cancer. The company is initiating a Phase 2 trial of the MRT-2359 plus ERLEADA combination in this setting. Additional positive clinical data for MRT-2359 in advanced prostate cancer were presented at ASCO GU 2026. Monte Rosa Therapeutics enters this news cycle with its shares at $15.63 and a 1 year return of 169.5%...
